description: A horizontal memorial graphic on a muted green background. Two circular insets at the top show a photograph of a bearded man in a Border Patrol uniform and a gold CBP Border Patrol Agent badge draped with a black mourning band. A black banner reads BORDER PATROL AGENT, with large white text below giving a name, Sean M. McDonough. A light band at the bottom reads END OF WATCH: MAY 1, 2026, beside a U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark.
notable_text: BORDER PATROL AGENT; SEAN M. McDONOUGH; END OF WATCH: MAY 1, 2026; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
